children.text: S C H O L L Y
Many scholarships have very broad requirements. It may initially seem like you don't qualify for a particular scholarship, but you really might!
Lots of the essays required for scholarships have very similar prompts. Write a general-purpose essay and tweak it for all your scholarship applications!
Just because a scholarship prefers a certain major doesn't mean it's required. Apply away!

California State University - Long Beach
University of California - Irvine
Describe a situation where you or others were treated unfairly. Why do you think this happened? How did you respond? Did the situation improve?
Is there anything else you would like to tell us about personal characteristics, obstacles you have overcome, etc.
How did you spend your last two summers?
